Forget modern pressing! Sacchi's AC Milan defined an era with one untouchable tactical masterclass. Their zonal marking and ridiculously high line made the offside trap an art form. Every opponent knew what was coming, but still couldn't break it. Pure football genius that changed the game forever. #ACMilan #Tactics #FootballHistory

Did we ever truly appreciate this trailblazer?! George Weah wasn't just an African legend; he's still the only African to win the Ballon d'Or (1995). His raw power and iconic solo runs for AC Milan? Unplayable. Redefined what an attacking force could be. Generational talent! #FootballHistory #ACMilan #Weah
